## Summary

The manuscript source preview on `/manuscripts/[id]` displayed text in a cramped, hard-to-read format (14px sans-serif, tight line spacing). This applies professional manuscript formatting conventions:

- **Double-spaced** (`leading-[2]` = 2× line height) — standard manuscript formatting
- **Serif font** (`font-rg-serif`) — matches manuscript/literary convention
- **16px base size** (`text-base`) — up from 14px (`text-sm`)
- **Wider horizontal padding** (`px-6`) — more comfortable reading margins

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `app/manuscripts/[manuscriptId]/page.tsx` — Source preview div styling (single line change)

**Does NOT touch:**
- No content/logic changes
- No evaluation pipeline changes
- No other pages

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Purely cosmetic CSS change — zero functional risk
- Double-spaced text means less content visible in the fixed-height preview (520px), but the scroll container handles overflow

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — UI-only change to manuscript source preview styling
